title: Performance, Migration, API Design, and Release Evidence · Contract Lens: Compiler Performance
summary: Migrate and publish a production-shaped TypeScript 7 library with measurable compiler performance and consumer proof. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts compiler performance increment in a TypeScript 7 migration and release portfolio. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure cold and warm checks, project graphs, declarations, memory, and parallelism before changing configuration.
Replace clever types when diagnostics, performance, or maintenance cost exceeds their safety value.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
